judgement_note: abaut focuses on supplier/procurement digitization, which is the clearest fit in the current golden partner set.
LOOM is a digital/web growth agency profile and should map to the digital-agency partner rather than a generic SaaS/process match.
Meplato sits in procurement/supplier management, making SitePlan the strongest judged partner match among the current options.
XPLN should only match when the system can justify the overlap through workflow / document-process common ground rather than generic SaaS language.
MOQO is a mobility / shared-use operations case and should only map to a partner with real mobility-operations overlap.
AZOWO should align on fleet / mobility workflow common ground rather than broad automation claims.
ENTIAC is a good judged no-match case unless the system can surface real shared audience or workflow evidence.
21strategies should not receive a forced partner unless the overlap is concretely evidenced; this is a key false-positive guardrail.
